query_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY

query_thread_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY

query_metric_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY

part_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY

text_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 2 DAY

trace_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 2 DAY

processors_profile_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 2 DAY

metric_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY

asynchronous_metric_log.engine: Engine = MergeTree PARTITION BY toYYYYMM(event_date) ORDER BY event_time TTL event_date + INTERVAL 7 DAY
